label: Editorial Lux
description: Premium, lifestyle, and fashion-led landing pages with editorial framing.
signatureMotif: editorial framing, premium contrast, and restrained luxury accents
promptHints: Use stronger storytelling and atmosphere than a normal brochure page.
Treat whitespace and image framing as part of the premium experience.

layouts: Use a cinematic split hero with one oversized portrait or campaign image opposite a narrow text column and a single gold-accent CTA.
Compose feature storytelling as alternating full-width image bands and offset copy blocks, with generous top and bottom whitespace between sections.
Build product or collection highlights as a staggered two-column editorial grid with varied image crops, caption text, and a floating detail card.
Present testimonials or brand statements in a centered narrow column framed by thin borders, followed by a luxurious logo strip or press row.
Use a three-card offering section with the center card slightly raised, darker than the page, and finished with refined border treatment.
motifs: Pair near-black surfaces with warm ivory typography, muted bronze accents, and occasional soft gold highlights that feel expensive rather than flashy.
Use thin editorial rules, framed image containers, and oversized serif headlines to create magazine-like hierarchy and visual restraint.
Let whitespace feel intentional and abundant, with narrow text measures, tall section spacing, and carefully cropped imagery carrying the mood.
Favor rounded corners around 1.2rem, soft dark cards, and subtle border contrast instead of bright shadows or glossy glass effects.
antiPatterns: Avoid loud neon gradients, iridescent blobs, or startup-style glow effects that break the restrained luxury mood.
Never stack dense feature grids or dashboard-like icon blocks that make the page feel SaaS-functional instead of editorial-premium.
Avoid bright white backgrounds or high-key pastel sections; the experience should stay moody, atmospheric, and contrast-led.
Do not use chunky pill-heavy UI, playful illustrations, or cartoon iconography that cheapen the fashion-led framing.

themeTokens.bodyBackgroundImage: radial-gradient(ellipse at top, color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-primary) 14%, transparent) 0%, transparent 38%), radial-gradient(circle at bottom right, color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-accent) 18%, transparent) 0%, transparent 32%)
